summary: Frontend-only testing of 5 new features: WaveSpeed UI labels, Gallery Firebase backup, Freepik custom structure ref, backup timestamps, and multi-user isolation. All features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features verified: (1) WaveSpeed 3 slots labeled 'Character / Face', 'Pose / Style', 'Scene / BG' with sub-hints visible. (2) Settings Firebase section has 'Backup Gallery to Firebase Storage' button with gallery count info, disabled when gallery empty. (3) Freepik 'Structure Reference (img2img)' slot with 'Upload custom image' area confirmed. (4) Timestamp fields are conditional (only shown after actual sync/backup — no issue on fresh load). (5) /api/sync/unknown_user_id returns 404. App loads fine, all screens render.

feature_test_results.feature_1_wavespeed_labels: PASS — 'Character / Face', 'Pose / Style', 'Scene / BG' labels and hints confirmed
feature_test_results.feature_2_gallery_firebase_backup: PASS — Button visible, disabled when gallery empty, gallery count info shown
feature_test_results.feature_3_freepik_structure_ref: PASS — 'Structure Reference (img2img)' label + 'Upload custom image' area present
feature_test_results.feature_4_backup_timestamps: PASS — Code conditional display correct; timestamps show after first sync/backup
